name: repo-and-pull-req
description: GitHub and Jira/Confluence integration — setup, push, wiki, and autonomous PR review

skills.name: gh_setup
skills.description: Install gh CLI, authenticate with GitHub, verify API access

skills.name: gh_push
skills.description: Push code to GitHub as PR using jj bookmark + git push pattern

skills.name: gh_wiki
skills.description: Create/update GitHub wiki pages with PR knowledge

skills.name: gh_pull_req_review
skills.description: Autonomous PR review — check comments, fix code, answer questions, auto-rebase

skills.name: jira_setup
skills.description: Install jira-cli, create Atlassian account, configure API token

skills.name: jira_push
skills.description: Create/update Jira issues to track pushed work

skills.name: jira_wiki
skills.description: Create/update Confluence pages with PR knowledge sharing

skills.name: jira_pull_req_review
skills.description: Autonomous Jira-linked PR review — check comments, fix, rebase

agents.name: review_loop
agents.description: Autonomous hourly PR review agent — reads PR status, processes comments, fixes code, auto-rebases
